title: KERIFI Rollerball Pens Black Ink 26 Pack Black Gel Pens, 0.5mm Liquid Ink Ballpoint Pens Quick-Drying and Smooth, Writing Pens for Bullet Journal, Notes, Sketch, Black Pens for School Office Supplies
features: 【26 Pack Rollerball Pens Black Ink】: Our black ballpoint pens use high-quality MIKUNI inks, and the nibs are made of tungsten carbide spheres for high hardness. These liquid ink rollerball pens with a 0.5mm tip, easy to use, comfortable grip, quick drying without spilling ink, no smudging when exposed to water, and do not easily penetrate paper, helping you keep your work neat and organized

【Unique Design】: Each black gel pens is equipped with a durable metal clip, easy to carry and drop-proof, you can also check the ink capacity through the transparent ink window of the fountain pen, to avoid the inconvenience of running out of ink at critical moments. The black pens ballpoint has a built-in precision ink output regulator, with a dense top and sparse bottom structure to regulate the pressure inside the handwriting pens, making the ink output stable and ensuring smooth writing

【Large Capacity Ink】: This ballpoint pens black ink features a straight liquid construction, 1100m large ink storage capacity that is 3 times that of ordinary refill Ballpoint pen gel pen. These black ink pens flow and write more smoothly than traditional black pen. This writing pens will meet your daily study and office needs

【Safe Black Ink】: This ballpoint pens ink meets ASTM D-4236 and EN71 standards, is safe and non-toxic, safe for children and adults. The roller ball pens for writing are ideal for students and business people

【Variety Uses】: These fine gel pens for writing, note taking, bullet journaling, travel diary, signing, painting, sketching, cartooning, illustrating, outlining, doodling and more. These pens multipack are perfect for schools, homes, offices, businesses and a great gift for kids, students, teachers and creative artists

【Don't Hesitate to Add to Cart】: Each of our ball point pens undergoes rigorous inspection before leaving the factory. And we are committed to the pursuit of your ultimate satisfaction. If you have any questions or suggestions about these 0.5mm school pens, please contact us and give us an opportunity to improve, we will respond to you with a satisfactory solution
description: Product Description Smooth Writing & Quick Drying: Black & Premium Ink: The ink of KERIFI liquid ink rollerball pens are selected from the high-end quality ink of Japanese MIKUNI, quick-drying and ink flow smoothly. Conforms to ASTM D-4236 and EN71 standards, non-toxic, acid-free, waterproof and fade resistant, safety for kids and adults. Well-Designed Bullet Tip: The 0.5mm black ballpoint pens nibs are made of tungsten carbide ball, high hardness, reliable and durable, has a nice smooth touch on any kind of paper surface. Visual and Ink Regulator Transparent ink supply marking window allows you to easily check the amount of ink remaining; The black writing pens has a built-in precision ink output regulator, with a dense top and a sparse bottom to regulate the internal pressure of the biros, making the ink output stable and ensuring smooth writing Large Capacity Ink These ballpoint pens black ink features a straight liquid construction, 1100m large ink storage capacity that is 3 times that of ordinary refill Ballpoint pen gel pen. These black ink pens flow and write more smoothly than traditional black pen 26 Pack Pens Multipack These liquid ink black handwriting pens are smooth and easy to use, with a comfortable grip that won't penetrate paper, and a durable metal clip for easy carrying Black pens ballpoint are essential stationery items for school, home and office These ball point pens multipack are perfect for writing, signing, note taking, memo writing, bullet journaling, letter writing, drawing, sketching, underlining, illustrating, outlining, doodling, cartooning, comic strips, sketchbooks and more. handwriting pens black are suitable for students, teachers, business people and many other groups. School pens make great gifts for kids, friends, students and teachers Cautions: 1. The black ball point pens tip contains small parts and a pointed tip and is not suitable for children under 3 years old. 2. Please store the gel ink rollerball pens for school horizontally and put the cap on after each use to prolong its life
